chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 572 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for Respondents/SIDA >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. This Petition is pending on the file of this Court since, 2022 and was lastly fixed in Court on 26-05-2023. Thereafter no concrete efforts were taken either by the Petitioners or their Counsel to pursue the matter diligently. The conduct of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
